input.background: A shared-load system refers to a parallel system whose units equally share the system function. For a shared-load parallel system to fail, all the units in the system must fail. The problem involves determining the reliability and mean time to failure (MTTF) of a 3-unit shared-load parallel system where λ₀ is the constant failure rate of a unit when all three units are operational, λₕ is the constant failure rate of each of the two surviving units sharing half of the total load, and λf is the constant failure rate of a unit at full load.
input.question: Determine the reliability at t=10 hours where λ₀=0.001/hour, λₕ=0.005/hour, and λf=0.05/hour.
